languages.text: {n}Грузное тело Эоганна с грохотом оседает на пол. Над ним продолжает безмолвно парить сервочереп, которого он называл Нунциусом. Пустые глазницы машины безучастно смотрят куда-то мимо, послушно ожидая новых команд.{/n}

{n}Eogunn's ponderous body drops to the deck with a clang. The servo-skull he called Nuncius continues hovering silently above him. The machine's empty eye sockets stare blankly into the distance, awaiting new commands.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Грузное тело Эоганна с грохотом оседает на пол. Над ним продолжает безмолвно парить сервочереп, которого он называл Нунциусом. Пустые глазницы машины безучастно смотрят куда-то мимо, послушно ожидая новых команд.{/n}

{n}Eogunn's ponderous body drops to the deck with a clang. The servo-skull he called Nuncius continues hovering silently above him. The machine's empty eye sockets stare blankly into the distance, awaiting new commands.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El pesado cuerpo de Eogunn cae sobre la cubierta con un clamor metálico. El servocráneo al que llamaba Nuncius sigue flotando en silencio por encima de su cadáver. Las cuencas vacías de la máquina se clavan en la distancia, esperando nuevas órdenes.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's ponderous body drops to the deck with a clang. The servo-skull he called Nuncius continues hovering silently above him. The machine's empty eye sockets stare blankly into the distance, awaiting new commands.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El pesado cuerpo de Eogunn cae sobre la cubierta con un clamor metálico. El servocráneo al que llamaba Nuncius sigue flotando en silencio por encima de su cadáver. Las cuencas vacías de la máquina se clavan en la distancia, esperando nuevas órdenes.{/n}

languages.text: {n}伴着一声金属巨响，伊奥贡沉重的躯体砸向甲板。那个被他称作努恩修斯的伺服头骨依然在他上方默默地悬停着。这台机器空洞的眼窝茫然地注视着远方，等待着新的指令。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's ponderous body drops to the deck with a clang. The servo-skull he called Nuncius continues hovering silently above him. The machine's empty eye sockets stare blankly into the distance, awaiting new commands.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}伴着一声金属巨响，伊奥贡沉重的躯体砸向甲板。那个被他称作努恩修斯的伺服头骨依然在他上方默默地悬停着。这台机器空洞的眼窝茫然地注视着远方，等待着新的指令。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le corps lourd d'Eogunn s'effondre sur le pont dans un grand fracas métallique. Le servocrâne qu'il appelait Nuncius continue de flotter silencieusement au-dessus de lui. Les orbites vides de la machine regardent fixement au loin en attendant de nouveaux ordres.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's ponderous body drops to the deck with a clang. The servo-skull he called Nuncius continues hovering silently above him. The machine's empty eye sockets stare blankly into the distance, awaiting new commands.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le corps lourd d'Eogunn s'effondre sur le pont dans un grand fracas métallique. Le servocrâne qu'il appelait Nuncius continue de flotter silencieusement au-dessus de lui. Les orbites vides de la machine regardent fixement au loin en attendant de nouveaux ordres.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn'un hantal bedeni, bir çınlamayla güverteye yığılıyor. Nuncius dediği hizmelet ise bedeninin üzerinde sessizce havada süzülmeye devam ediyor. Makinenin boş göz çukurları, yeni emirler bekleyerek boşluğa bakıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's ponderous body drops to the deck with a clang. The servo-skull he called Nuncius continues hovering silently above him. The machine's empty eye sockets stare blankly into the distance, awaiting new commands.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn'un hantal bedeni, bir çınlamayla güverteye yığılıyor. Nuncius dediği hizmelet ise bedeninin üzerinde sessizce havada süzülmeye devam ediyor. Makinenin boş göz çukurları, yeni emirler bekleyerek boşluğa bakıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunns behäbiger Leib fällt geräuschvoll auf den Boden. Der Servoschädel, den er Nuncius nannte, schwebt weiter lautlos über ihm. Die leeren Augenhöhlen der Maschine blicken in die Ferne und warten auf neue Befehle.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's ponderous body drops to the deck with a clang. The servo-skull he called Nuncius continues hovering silently above him. The machine's empty eye sockets stare blankly into the distance, awaiting new commands.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunns behäbiger Leib fällt geräuschvoll auf den Boden. Der Servoschädel, den er Nuncius nannte, schwebt weiter lautlos über ihm. Die leeren Augenhöhlen der Maschine blicken in die Ferne und warten auf neue Befehle.{/n}

languages.text: {n}エオグンのがっしりとした体が、音を立てて甲板に落ちる。ヌンシウスと呼ばれるサーボスカルは、彼の頭上で静かにホバリングを続けている。機械の空っぽの眼窩は遠くをぼんやりと見つめ、新たな命令を待っている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's ponderous body drops to the deck with a clang. The servo-skull he called Nuncius continues hovering silently above him. The machine's empty eye sockets stare blankly into the distance, awaiting new commands.{/n}
